title: Thunder, Perfect Mind
goal: Accuracy-first translation prep focused on preserving paradox, cadence, and antithetical voice.

cross_reference_strategy.notes: Keep the poem's self-contradictory pairings visible and reviewable.

primary_witnesses.notes: Primary online Phase E witness for Thunder, Perfect Mind.

guardrails: Preserve every paradoxical pair instead of smoothing contradictions into paraphrase.
Retain the repeated "I am" cadence where the witness supports it.
If a line becomes smoother but less strange, prefer the stranger but more faithful rendering.
